entry.title: Wolves rechazó intercambio de Raúl Jiménez por Aaron Ramsey Top 5

link.title: Wolves rechazó intercambio de Raúl Jiménez por Aaron Ramsey Top 5

entry.content: Luego de quedar eliminado en los Cuartos de Final de la Europa League contra Sevilla, el futuro de Raúl Jiménez lejos del Wolverhampton parece inminente; sin embargo, a pesar de la crisis económica que afecta al ‘mundo del futbol’ por la pandemia del Coronavirus, los Wolves no tienen pensado en malbaratar al ‘Killer’ mexicano. De acuerdo al rotativo italiano, Corriere dello Sport, el conjunto inglés rechazó la propuesta de la Juventus de intercambiar a Jiménez por el galés, Aaron Ramsey.
entry.summary: Luego de quedar eliminado en los Cuartos de Final de la Europa League contra Sevilla, el futuro de Raúl Jiménez lejos del Wolverhampton parece inminente; sin embargo, a pesar de la crisis económica que afecta al ‘mundo del futbol’ por la pandemia del Coronavirus, los Wolves no tienen pensado en malbaratar al ‘Killer’ mexicano. De acuerdo al rotativo italiano, Corriere dello Sport, el conjunto inglés rechazó la propuesta de la Juventus de intercambiar a Jiménez por el galés, Aaron Ramsey.

entry.title: Vladimir Poutine : cette rare confidence sur l’une de ses filles

link.title: Vladimir Poutine : cette rare confidence sur l’une de ses filles

entry.content: Lors d’une réunion gouvernementale, Vladimir Poutine a fait une annonce très importante, mardi 11 août 2020. Il a déclaré qu’un premier vaccin contre le coronavirus avait été développé en Russie. "Ce matin, pour la première fois au monde, un vaccin contre le nouveau coronavirus a été enregistré", a-t-il assuré comme le rapporte Le Figaro, avant d’ajouter qu’il savait "qu’il était assez efficace et qu’il donnait une immunité durable". Le président russe a également souligné que le vaccin avait passé avec succès l’intégralité des tests nécessaires. Alors qu’il aurait pu arrêter sa déclaration, il a tenu à informer la population que l’une de ses filles avait déjà reçu le vaccin. "Elle a participé à l’expérience", a-t-il indiqué, affirmant qu’elle avait eu un peu de température, "et c’est tout". Il est très rare que Vladimir Poutine donne des informations sur sa famille. Il n’a en revanche pas indiqué s’il s’agissait de Maria ou d’Ekaterina, qui sont les deux filles, qu’il a eu avec Lioud …
entry.summary: Lors d’une réunion gouvernementale, Vladimir Poutine a fait une annonce très importante, mardi 11 août 2020. Il a déclaré qu’un premier vaccin contre le coronavirus avait été développé en Russie. "Ce matin, pour la première fois au monde, un vaccin contre le nouveau coronavirus a été enregistré", a-t-il assuré comme le rapporte Le Figaro, avant d’ajouter qu’il savait "qu’il était assez efficace et qu’il donnait une immunité durable". Le président russe a également souligné que le vaccin avait passé avec succès l’intégralité des tests nécessaires. Alors qu’il aurait pu arrêter sa déclaration, il a tenu à informer la population que l’une de ses filles avait déjà reçu le vaccin. "Elle a participé à l’expérience", a-t-il indiqué, affirmant qu’elle avait eu un peu de température, "et c’est tout". Il est très rare que Vladimir Poutine donne des informations sur sa famille. Il n’a en revanche pas indiqué s’il s’agissait de Maria ou d’Ekaterina, qui sont les deux filles, qu’il a eu avec Lioud …

entry.title: Study Finds Some People Produce Antibodies to Opioid Drugs

link.title: Study Finds Some People Produce Antibodies to Opioid Drugs

entry.content:
Preliminary research out this week has found interesting news on patients taking opioids.
The research suggests patients taking opioids for chronic pain can produce antibodies to the drugs.
This could help explain some of the side-effects of long-term opioid use, reports Gizmodo.
These antibodies may also hamper efforts to create opioid vaccines.
Scientists hope it could treat opioid use disorder better than existing medications.
entry.summary: Preliminary research out this week has found interesting news on patients taking opioids. The research suggests patients taking opioids for chronic pain can produce antibodies to the drugs. This could help explain some of the side-effects of long-term opioid use, reports Gizmodo. These antibodies may also hamper efforts to create opioid vaccines. Scientists hope it could treat opioid use disorder better than existing medications.

entry.title: Unhinged - ‘Be Safe Out There’ Retro Trailer- Russell Crowe

link.title: Unhinged - ‘Be Safe Out There’ Retro Trailer- Russell Crowe

entry.content:
Check out the new "Be Safe Out There" Retro Trailer from Solstice Studios’ Unhinged featuring Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe. Directed by Derrick Borte and co-starring Caren Pistorius, this edge of your seat thriller takes something we’ve all experienced - road rage - to an unpredictable and terrifying conclusion.
Academy Award winner Russell Crowe stars in Unhinged, a timely psychological thriller that explores the fragile balance of a society pushed to the edge, taking something we’ve all experienced- road rage - to an unpredictable and terrifying conclusion. Rachel (Caren Pistorius) is running late to work when she has an altercation at a traffic light with a stranger (Crowe) whose life has left him feeling powerless and invisible. Soon, Rachel finds herself and everyone she loves the target of a man who decides to make one last mark upon the world by teaching her a series of deadly lessons. What follows is a dangerous game of cat and mouse that proves you never know just how close you are to someone who is about to become unhinged.
Solstice Studios and Ingenious Media present a film by Derrick Borte, starring Russell Crowe, Caren Pistorius, Gabriel Bateman, Jimmi Simpson and Austin P. McKenzie. Casting is by Mary Vernieu, CSA & Raylin Sabo, CSA, with Music by David Buckley and Costume Design by Denise Wingate. The film was edited by Mike McCusker ACE, Steven Mirkovichm ACE and Tim Mirkovich ACE, with Production Design by Fredrick Waff and Cinematography by Brendan Galvin. Guy Botham, Crystal Bourbeau, Mary C. Russell, Christopher Milburn, Gareth West, Peter Touche and Anders Erden serve as Executive Producers. Unhinged is produced by Lisa Ellzey, Mark Gill and Andrew Gunn and written by Carl Ellsworth.
See it in cinemas on August 21st. Tickets go on sale Friday, August 14.
entry.summary: Check out the new "Be Safe Out There" Retro Trailer from Solstice Studios’ Unhinged featuring Academy Award® winner Russell Crowe. Directed by Derrick Borte and co-starring Caren Pistorius, this edge of your seat thriller takes something we’ve all experienced - road rage - to an unpredictable and terrifying conclusion. Academy Award winner Russell Crowe stars in Unhinged, a timely psychological thriller that explores the fragile balance of a society pushed to the edge, taking something we’ve all experienced- road rage - to an unpredictable and terrifying conclusion. Rachel (Caren Pistorius) is running late to work when she has an altercation at a traffic light with a stranger (Crowe) whose life has left him feeling powerless and invisible. Soon, Rachel finds herself and everyone she loves the target of a man who decides to make one last mark upon the world by teaching her a series of deadly lessons. What follows is a dangerous game of cat and mouse that proves you never know just how close you are to someone who is about to become unhinged. Solstice Studios and Ingenious Media present a film by Derrick Borte, starring Russell Crowe, Caren Pistorius, Gabriel Bateman, Jimmi Simpson and Austin P. McKenzie. Casting is by Mary Vernieu, CSA & Raylin Sabo, CSA, with Music by David Buckley and Costume Design by Denise Wingate. The film was edited by Mike McCusker ACE, Steven Mirkovichm ACE and Tim Mirkovich ACE, with Production Design by Fredrick Waff and Cinematography by Brendan Galvin. Guy Botham, Crystal Bourbeau, Mary C. Russell, Christopher Milburn, Gareth West, Peter Touche and Anders Erden serve as Executive Producers. Unhinged is produced by Lisa Ellzey, Mark Gill and Andrew Gunn and written by Carl Ellsworth. See it in cinemas on August 21st. Tickets go on sale Friday, August 14.

entry.title: How to Cope With Pandemic Emotional Distress

link.title: How to Cope With Pandemic Emotional Distress

entry.content:
Here’s a simple way that can help us cope during the pandemic. Buzz60’s Elitsa Bizios reports.
How to Cope With Pandemic Emotional Distress
How to Cope With Pandemic Emotional Distress
How to Cope With Pandemic Emotional Distress
entry.summary: Here’s a simple way that can help us cope during the pandemic. Buzz60’s Elitsa Bizios reports.How to Cope With Pandemic Emotional Distress How to Cope With Pandemic Emotional Distress How to Cope With Pandemic Emotional Distress

entry.title: Coronavirus: India में Neem Capsule का Human Body पर ट्रायल,AIIA-ESIC के बीच समझौता वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus: India में Neem Capsule का Human Body पर ट्रायल,AIIA-ESIC के बीच समझौता वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Doctors and researchers of the country and the world are busy in finding the bite of the corona. On the one hand, many countries are engaged in scientific research to prepare its vaccine, while on the other hand, various domestic and foreign drug companies are also involved in making its medicine. Is engaged Ayurveda is also continuously used in this process. In such a situation, now All India Institute of Ayurveda has entered into an agreement with a company called Nisarg Herbs. These two organizations will test how effective Neem is in fighting Corona. This test will be done at ESIC Hospital in Faridabad.
देश और दुनिया के डॉक्टर और शोधकर्ता कोरोना की काट ढूंढने में दिन रा लगे हुए हैं.एक ओर इसकी वैक्सीन तैयार करने को लेकर कई देशों के वैज्ञानिक शोध में जुटे हुए हैं तो वहीं दूसरी ओर इसकी दवा बनाने में भी विभिन्न देसी और विदेशी ड्रग कंपनियां लगी हुई हैं। इस प्रक्रिया में आयुर्वेद भी लगातार प्रयोग कर रहा है. ऐसे में अब ऑल इंडिया इंस्टीट्यूट ऑफ आयुर्वेद ने निसर्ग हर्ब्स नाम की कंपनी के साथ समझौता किया है. ये दोनों संस्थाएं ये परीक्षण करेंगी कि कोरोना से लड़ने में नीम कितनी कारगर है. इस परीक्षण को फरीदाबाद के ESIC अस्पताल में किया जाएगा.
#Coronavirus #Covid19
entry.summary: Doctors and researchers of the country and the world are busy in finding the bite of the corona. On the one hand, many countries are engaged in scientific research to prepare its vaccine, while on the other hand, various domestic and foreign drug companies are also involved in making its medicine. Is engaged Ayurveda is also continuously used in this process. In such a situation, now All India Institute of Ayurveda has entered into an agreement with a company called Nisarg Herbs. These two organizations will test how effective Neem is in fighting Corona. This test will be done at ESIC Hospital in Faridabad. देश और दुनिया के डॉक्टर और शोधकर्ता कोरोना की काट ढूंढने में दिन रा लगे हुए हैं.एक ओर इसकी वैक्सीन तैयार करने को लेकर कई देशों के वैज्ञानिक शोध में जुटे हुए हैं तो वहीं दूसरी ओर इसकी दवा बनाने में भी विभिन्न देसी और विदेशी ड्रग कंपनियां लगी हुई हैं। इस प्रक्रिया में आयुर्वेद भी लगातार प्रयोग कर रहा है. ऐसे में अब ऑल इंडिया इंस्टीट्यूट ऑफ आयुर्वेद ने निसर्ग हर्ब्स नाम की कंपनी के साथ समझौता किया है. ये दोनों संस्थाएं ये परीक्षण करेंगी कि कोरोना से लड़ने में नीम कितनी कारगर है. इस परीक्षण को फरीदाबाद के ESIC अस्पताल में किया जाएगा. #Coronavirus #Covid19

entry.title: BA Betrayal protest

link.title: BA Betrayal protest

entry.content: Unite The Union members are holding a demonstration against British Airways about staff cuts outside Fareham civic offices, Fareham on 18 August 2020.
entry.summary: Unite The Union members are holding a demonstration against British Airways about staff cuts outside Fareham civic offices, Fareham on 18 August 2020.

entry.title: Palin’s Hopes For Harris

link.title: Palin’s Hopes For Harris

entry.content:
On Tuesday, Democratic Presidential nominee Joe Biden named Kamala Harris his running mate.
It’s the first time since 2008 that a woman was named the Vice Presidential nominee on a major party ticket.
In 2008, Alaska governor Sarah Palin was named John McCain’s VP on the Republican party’s ticket.
Republicans quickly slammed the media for what they called "sexist" coverage of Palin.
In an interview with Good Morning America, Palin reflected on how she was treated.
She said that she hopes the media and political analysts treat Harris better than they treated her.
"I hope that the media will treat her candidacy not as personally rough as they treated mine."
entry.summary: On Tuesday, Democratic Presidential nominee Joe Biden named Kamala Harris his running mate. It’s the first time since 2008 that a woman was named the Vice Presidential nominee on a major party ticket. In 2008, Alaska governor Sarah Palin was named John McCain’s VP on the Republican party’s ticket. Republicans quickly slammed the media for what they called "sexist" coverage of Palin. In an interview with Good Morning America, Palin reflected on how she was treated. She said that she hopes the media and political analysts treat Harris better than they treated her. "I hope that the media will treat her candidacy not as personally rough as they treated mine."

entry.title: Customs seize RM60mil worth of drugs in Port Klang

link.title: Customs seize RM60mil worth of drugs in Port Klang

entry.content:
The Customs Department recently seized three million Erimin 5 pills worth some RM60mil shipped in from Taiwan.
Customs director-general Datuk Seri Subromaniam Tholasy said the drugs which were hidden in a 20ft container were seized at North Port in Port Klang on Jan 31.
Read more at:
entry.summary: The Customs Department recently seized three million Erimin 5 pills worth some RM60mil shipped in from Taiwan. Customs director-general Datuk Seri Subromaniam Tholasy said the drugs which were hidden in a 20ft container were seized at North Port in Port Klang on Jan 31. Read more at:

entry.title: Así es como funciona la aplicación ‘Radar COVID’

link.title: Así es como funciona la aplicación ‘Radar COVID’

entry.content:
La aplicación móvil ‘Radar COVID’, diseñada y dirigida por la Secretaría de Estado de Digitalización e Inteligencia Artificial del Gobierno de España, ha superado su fase de pruebas y está lista para su descarga. El programa había estado funcionando en la isla canaria de La Gomera entre los meses de junio y julio y los resultados eran muy positivos.
Es gratuita y voluntaria. Tampoco es obligatorio introducir el código que facilite el médico en la app aunque el resultado de la prueba haya sido positiva.
Síguenos también en:
entry.summary: La aplicación móvil ‘Radar COVID’, diseñada y dirigida por la Secretaría de Estado de Digitalización e Inteligencia Artificial del Gobierno de España, ha superado su fase de pruebas y está lista para su descarga. El programa había estado funcionando en la isla canaria de La Gomera entre los meses de junio y julio y los resultados eran muy positivos. Es gratuita y voluntaria. Tampoco es obligatorio introducir el código que facilite el médico en la app aunque el resultado de la prueba haya sido positiva. Síguenos también en:

entry.title: SUITS／スーツ2 5話 動画 2020年8月10日

link.title: SUITS／スーツ2 5話 動画 2020年8月10日

entry.content:
過去の勝利は、隠蔽（いんぺい）によるものだったのか？甲斐（織田裕二）は「コースタル・モーターズ」の自動車に乗っていた運転手が事故死した裁判で勝訴したものの、同社の自動車に欠陥があったことを示す社内メモが見つかったことで窮地に立たされたが、甲斐自身はメモの存在すら知らなかった。だが、甲斐に強烈な敵愾心（てきがいしん）を抱く弁護士・富樫（髙嶋政宏）は、甲斐を徹底的に追及することを宣言する。
この件を知った上杉（吉田鋼太郎）は、今こそ団結して事務所を守るべきだと主張し、甲斐のために優秀な弁護士・副島絵美里（清水ミチコ）を連れてくる。だが、早急かつ、秘密裏に和解を進めるべきだと提案する副島に、反発する甲斐。チカ（鈴木保奈美）は、そんな甲斐を制して副島を雇うことに。一方、玉井（中村アン）は、コースタル訴訟の資料の中から問題になっている社内メモを発見し、そこには玉井のサインもあった。思いつめた表情でシュレッダーの前に立つ玉井のもとへやってきた大輔（中島裕翔）は、彼女が持っていたファイルに違和感を感じて・・・。
そんな折、プロモーターの星川卓郎（田中要次）が、天才テニス少年とうわさされる高山雄哉（髙橋優斗）を伴って甲斐を訪ねてくる。雄哉は、プロ入りに反対する父親と、法的に親子の縁を切りたいのだという。甲斐は、この案件を大輔に任せることにするが・・・。
entry.summary: 過去の勝利は、隠蔽（いんぺい）によるものだったのか？甲斐（織田裕二）は「コースタル・モーターズ」の自動車に乗っていた運転手が事故死した裁判で勝訴したものの、同社の自動車に欠陥があったことを示す社内メモが見つかったことで窮地に立たされたが、甲斐自身はメモの存在すら知らなかった。だが、甲斐に強烈な敵愾心（てきがいしん）を抱く弁護士・富樫（髙嶋政宏）は、甲斐を徹底的に追及することを宣言する。 この件を知った上杉（吉田鋼太郎）は、今こそ団結して事務所を守るべきだと主張し、甲斐のために優秀な弁護士・副島絵美里（清水ミチコ）を連れてくる。だが、早急かつ、秘密裏に和解を進めるべきだと提案する副島に、反発する甲斐。チカ（鈴木保奈美）は、そんな甲斐を制して副島を雇うことに。一方、玉井（中村アン）は、コースタル訴訟の資料の中から問題になっている社内メモを発見し、そこには玉井のサインもあった。思いつめた表情でシュレッダーの前に立つ玉井のもとへやってきた大輔（中島裕翔）は、彼女が持っていたファイルに違和感を感じて・・・。 そんな折、プロモーターの星川卓郎（田中要次）が、天才テニス少年とうわさされる高山雄哉（髙橋優斗）を伴って甲斐を訪ねてくる。雄哉は、プロ入りに反対する父親と、法的に親子の縁を切りたいのだという。甲斐は、この案件を大輔に任せることにするが・・・。

entry.title: Dil Ruba Episode 20 HUM TV Drama 15 August 2020

entry.content:

entry.title: Does Race Change COVID Death Rates? New Study Says No.

link.title: Does Race Change COVID Death Rates? New Study Says No.

entry.content:
White Americans hospitalized with COVID-19 are just as likely to die from the disease as Black Americans.
This is according to a study published Tuesday by JAMA Network Open, reports UPI.
Just over 23% of White patients with COVID-19 being treated in the hospital ultimately died.
This is in comparison to 19% of Black patients who ultimately die, the data showed.
Research shows that Black and Hispanic Americans are hospitalized up to three times more often.
However, with access to care, the death rates appear to even out between races.
entry.summary: White Americans hospitalized with COVID-19 are just as likely to die from the disease as Black Americans. This is according to a study published Tuesday by JAMA Network Open, reports UPI. Just over 23% of White patients with COVID-19 being treated in the hospital ultimately died. This is in comparison to 19% of Black patients who ultimately die, the data showed. Research shows that Black and Hispanic Americans are hospitalized up to three times more often. However, with access to care, the death rates appear to even out between races.

entry.title: Patrick Sébastien boudé par les chaînes de télévision

link.title: Patrick Sébastien boudé par les chaînes de télévision

entry.content: Un peu plus d’un an après sa dernière émission sur France 2, la blessure est encore fraîche pour Patrick Sébastien. L’animateur multiplie les projets, mais s’avoue surpris de ne pas avoir reçu d’offres d’une autre chaîne de télévision pour une émission.
entry.summary: Un peu plus d’un an après sa dernière émission sur France 2, la blessure est encore fraîche pour Patrick Sébastien. L’animateur multiplie les projets, mais s’avoue surpris de ne pas avoir reçu d’offres d’une autre chaîne de télévision pour une émission.

entry.title: Mohabbat Tujhe Alvida Episode 11 Promo HUM TV Drama

link.title: Mohabbat Tujhe Alvida Episode 11 Promo HUM TV Drama

entry.content:
Mohabbat Tujhe Alvida, Episode 11 Promo, Official HD Video - 19 August 2020
The plot of "Mohabbat Tujhe Alvida" revolves around a charming couple played by Zahid Ahmed and Sonya Hussyn from a middle-class background. Like every married pair, they have wholesome desires to make their life just perfect. One of them has a love for money and the greed for money which will make their relationship face the test of time.
Starring
Sonya Hussain, Zahid Ahmed, Mansha Pasha, Jawed Shiekh, Sajida Syed, Angeline Malik, Mizna Waqas, Muzaina Malik, Syeda Anusha, Hammad Siddiq, Hassam Khan, Saad Fareedi, Falak Shahzad & Others.
Directed By: Barkat Sidiki
Written By: Abdul Khaliq Khan
Produced By: Barkat Sidiki & Zayed Shiekh
#MohabbatTujheAlvida #SonyaHussain #ZahidAhmed #ManshaPasha #HUMTV #Drama #JawedShiekh
entry.summary: Mohabbat Tujhe Alvida, Episode 11 Promo, Official HD Video - 19 August 2020 The plot of "Mohabbat Tujhe Alvida" revolves around a charming couple played by Zahid Ahmed and Sonya Hussyn from a middle-class background. Like every married pair, they have wholesome desires to make their life just perfect. One of them has a love for money and the greed for money which will make their relationship face the test of time. Starring Sonya Hussain, Zahid Ahmed, Mansha Pasha, Jawed Shiekh, Sajida Syed, Angeline Malik, Mizna Waqas, Muzaina Malik, Syeda Anusha, Hammad Siddiq, Hassam Khan, Saad Fareedi, Falak Shahzad & Others. Directed By: Barkat Sidiki Written By: Abdul Khaliq Khan Produced By: Barkat Sidiki & Zayed Shiekh #MohabbatTujheAlvida #SonyaHussain #ZahidAhmed #ManshaPasha #HUMTV #Drama #JawedShiekh

entry.title: Sudiksha Bhati Case: पुलिस के हाथ खाली, आरोपियों पर 20 हजार का इनाम घोषित वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sudiksha Bhati Case: पुलिस के हाथ खाली, आरोपियों पर 20 हजार का इनाम घोषित वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Bulandshahr police has now started the investigation of all those possessing bullet bikes for the arrest of the bullet-ridden accused in the high profile Sudiksha Bhati case. On behalf of the Sub Divisional Transport Department, Bulandshahar Police has been given details of those who have more than 10 thousand 700 bullet motorcycles. It is being told that from those who own these bullet bikes, they will get a clue about the accused of Sudiksha. For the arrest of the accused, the police has put a lot of effort, the police has declared a reward of 20 thousand on the accused who were riding the bullet.
हाईप्रोफाइल सुदीक्षा भाटी केस में बुलेट सवार आरोपियों की गिरफ्तारी के लिए अब बुलंदशहर पुलिस ने सभी बुलेट बाइक रखने वालों की जांच शुरू कर दी है. उप संभागीय परिवहन विभाग की तरफ से बुलंदशहर पुलिस को 10 हजार 700 से ज्यादा बुलेट मोटरसाइकिल रखने वालों का ब्यौरा दिया गया है. बताया जा रहा है कि इन्हीं बुलेट बाइक रखने वालों से सुदीक्षा के आरोपियों के बारे में सुराग मिलेगा. आरोपियों की गिरफ्तारी के लिए पुलिस ने एड़ी-चोटी का जोर लगा रखा है, बुलेट सवार रहे आरोपियों पर पुलिस 20 हजार का इनाम घोषित कर चुकी है.
#SudikshaBhatiCase #BulandshahrPolice #RewardAccused
entry.summary: Bulandshahr police has now started the investigation of all those possessing bullet bikes for the arrest of the bullet-ridden accused in the high profile Sudiksha Bhati case. On behalf of the Sub Divisional Transport Department, Bulandshahar Police has been given details of those who have more than 10 thousand 700 bullet motorcycles. It is being told that from those who own these bullet bikes, they will get a clue about the accused of Sudiksha. For the arrest of the accused, the police has put a lot of effort, the police has declared a reward of 20 thousand on the accused who were riding the bullet. हाईप्रोफाइल सुदीक्षा भाटी केस में बुलेट सवार आरोपियों की गिरफ्तारी के लिए अब बुलंदशहर पुलिस ने सभी बुलेट बाइक रखने वालों की जांच शुरू कर दी है. उप संभागीय परिवहन विभाग की तरफ से बुलंदशहर पुलिस को 10 हजार 700 से ज्यादा बुलेट मोटरसाइकिल रखने वालों का ब्यौरा दिया गया है. बताया जा रहा है कि इन्हीं बुलेट बाइक रखने वालों से सुदीक्षा के आरोपियों के बारे में सुराग मिलेगा. आरोपियों की गिरफ्तारी के लिए पुलिस ने एड़ी-चोटी का जोर लगा रखा है, बुलेट सवार रहे आरोपियों पर पुलिस 20 हजार का इनाम घोषित कर चुकी है. #SudikshaBhatiCase #BulandshahrPolice #RewardAccused

entry.title: Judas and the Black Messiah Trailer #1 (2021) Jesse Plemons, LaKeith Stanfield Drama Movie HD

link.title: Judas and the Black Messiah Trailer #1 (2021) Jesse Plemons, LaKeith Stanfield Drama Movie HD

entry.content:
Trailer for Judas and the Black Messiah, starring Jesse Plemons, LaKeith Stanfield, Martin Sheen, Daniel Kaluuya and Ashton Sanders.
"You can murder a revolutionary, but you can’t murder a revolution."
Starring Daniel Kaluuya and LaKeith Stanfield, JUDAS AND THE BLACK MESSIAH is a movie about the betrayal and assassination of Fred Hampton, chairman of the Black Panther Party.
Chairman Fred Hampton (Daniel Kaluuya) was 21 years old when he was assassinated by the FBI, who coerced a petty criminal named William O’Neal (LaKeith Stanfield) to help them silence him and the Black Panther Party. But they could not kill Fred Hampton’s legacy and, 50 years later, his words still echo … louder than ever.
Though his life was cut short, Fred Hampton’s impact has continued to reverberate. The government saw the Black Panthers as a militant threat to the status quo and sold that lie to a frightened public in a time of growing civil unrest. But the perception of the Panthers was not reality. In inner cities across America, they were providing free breakfasts for children, legal services, medical clinics and research into sickle cell anemia, and political education. And it was Chairman Fred in Chicago, who, recognizing the power of multicultural unity for a common cause, created the Rainbow Coalition – joining forces with other oppressed peoples in the city to fight for equality and political empowerment.
entry.summary: Trailer for Judas and the Black Messiah, starring Jesse Plemons, LaKeith Stanfield, Martin Sheen, Daniel Kaluuya and Ashton Sanders. "You can murder a revolutionary, but you can’t murder a revolution." Starring Daniel Kaluuya and LaKeith Stanfield, JUDAS AND THE BLACK MESSIAH is a movie about the betrayal and assassination of Fred Hampton, chairman of the Black Panther Party. Chairman Fred Hampton (Daniel Kaluuya) was 21 years old when he was assassinated by the FBI, who coerced a petty criminal named William O’Neal (LaKeith Stanfield) to help them silence him and the Black Panther Party. But they could not kill Fred Hampton’s legacy and, 50 years later, his words still echo … louder than ever. Though his life was cut short, Fred Hampton’s impact has continued to reverberate. The government saw the Black Panthers as a militant threat to the status quo and sold that lie to a frightened public in a time of growing civil unrest. But the perception of the Panthers was not reality. In inner cities across America, they were providing free breakfasts for children, legal services, medical clinics and research into sickle cell anemia, and political education. And it was Chairman Fred in Chicago, who, recognizing the power of multicultural unity for a common cause, created the Rainbow Coalition – joining forces with other oppressed peoples in the city to fight for equality and political empowerment.

entry.title: The Star’s Sheffield Wednesday podcast - August 19, 2020

link.title: The Star’s Sheffield Wednesday podcast - August 19, 2020

entry.content: DISCLAIMER: We’re going to talk about the extensive document highlighting the reasons behind the decision to deduct Sheffield Wednesday 12 points and not punish them for the other EFL charges. No, wait! It’ll be okay. We’ve done the hard reading so you don’t have to. The Star’s Owls writers Joe Crann and Alex Miller join Liam Hoden after pouring over what was a very insightful and at times eyebrow-raising document that could come to define the next few years at Hillsborough. They wade through the mud slinging and outrageous accusations and find sloppiness on both sides of the argument. But it’s not all legal stuff - Wednesday are back in pre-season training and things are looking bright at Middlewood Road. The panel discuss the arrival of Chey Dunkley and what he will bring to the party, and they also look ahead to the season-opening fixture, the Carabao Cup clash with Walsall.
entry.summary: DISCLAIMER: We’re going to talk about the extensive document highlighting the reasons behind the decision to deduct Sheffield Wednesday 12 points and not punish them for the other EFL charges. No, wait! It’ll be okay. We’ve done the hard reading so you don’t have to. The Star’s Owls writers Joe Crann and Alex Miller join Liam Hoden after pouring over what was a very insightful and at times eyebrow-raising document that could come to define the next few years at Hillsborough. They wade through the mud slinging and outrageous accusations and find sloppiness on both sides of the argument. But it’s not all legal stuff - Wednesday are back in pre-season training and things are looking bright at Middlewood Road. The panel discuss the arrival of Chey Dunkley and what he will bring to the party, and they also look ahead to the season-opening fixture, the Carabao Cup clash with Walsall.

entry.title: Sushant Case में CBI मंजूरी मिलते ही सोशल मीडिया पर Troll हुईं Rhea Chakraborty FilmiBeat

link.title: Sushant Case में CBI मंजूरी मिलते ही सोशल मीडिया पर Troll हुईं Rhea Chakraborty FilmiBeat

entry.content:
After getting the approval of the CBI investigation, Rhea Chakraborty has come on the target of trolls.Watch Out
#SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakraborty #FansReactionOnRhea
entry.summary: After getting the approval of the CBI investigation, Rhea Chakraborty has come on the target of trolls.Watch Out #SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakraborty #FansReactionOnRhea

entry.title: L214 dévoile ‘le pire élevage’ jamais filmé par l’association avec des images insoutenables

link.title: L214 dévoile ‘le pire élevage’ jamais filmé par l’association avec des images insoutenables

entry.content: L’association a filmé une exploitation de canards mâles destinés à la filière foie gras. Leurs conditions de vie sont effroyables.
entry.summary: L’association a filmé une exploitation de canards mâles destinés à la filière foie gras. Leurs conditions de vie sont effroyables.

entry.title: Meghan et Harry à Los Angeles : la sordide anecdote derrière leur nouvelle maison

link.title: Meghan et Harry à Los Angeles : la sordide anecdote derrière leur nouvelle maison

entry.content:
Meghan et Harry à Los Angeles :
la sordide anecdote
derrière leur nouvelle maison.
Les maisons ont parfois un lourd passé. .
Celle de Meghan Markle et du prince Harry 
n’a pas échappé à la "malédiction". .
Le Daily Mail révèle les sombres histoires de l’ancien propriétaire du terrain de la villa de Santa Barbara
dont le couple a fait l’acquisition. .
La maison, achetée pour près de 15 millions d’euros, faisait auparavant partie de l’immense propriété
de Stanley McCormick.
L’homme était un addict au sexe et schizophrène décrit comme "profondément perturbé".
Riche héritier d’un père qui a révolutionné l’agriculture, il dormait avec un harnais en cuir
afin de le maintenir en place. .
Une équipe de docteurs et soignants devaient le contenir pour l’empêcher de s’en prendre à son épouse,
ses sœurs et aux autres femmes. .
Son état s’aggravant au fil du temps, l’homme développant notamment une obsession pour le fétichisme sexuel,
son épouse recevra l’interdiction de le voir. .
L’homme, confiné au deuxième étage de sa maison, finira par mourir en 1947, d’une pneumonie
entry.summary: Meghan et Harry à Los Angeles : la sordide anecdote derrière leur nouvelle maison. Les maisons ont parfois un lourd passé. . Celle de Meghan Markle et du prince Harry n’a pas échappé à la "malédiction". . Le Daily Mail révèle les sombres histoires de l’ancien propriétaire du terrain de la villa de Santa Barbara dont le couple a fait l’acquisition. . La maison, achetée pour près de 15 millions d’euros, faisait auparavant partie de l’immense propriété de Stanley McCormick. L’homme était un addict au sexe et schizophrène décrit comme "profondément perturbé". Riche héritier d’un père qui a révolutionné l’agriculture, il dormait avec un harnais en cuir afin de le maintenir en place. . Une équipe de docteurs et soignants devaient le contenir pour l’empêcher de s’en prendre à son épouse, ses sœurs et aux autres femmes. . Son état s’aggravant au fil du temps, l’homme développant notamment une obsession pour le fétichisme sexuel, son épouse recevra l’interdiction de le voir. . L’homme, confiné au deuxième étage de sa maison, finira par mourir en 1947, d’une pneumonie

entry.title: CHP yandaşı Can Ataklı’dan çok konuşulacak Muharrem İnce yorumu

link.title: CHP yandaşı Can Ataklı’dan çok konuşulacak Muharrem İnce yorumu

entry.content:
CHP yandaşı gazeteci Can Ataklı, yeni bir parti kuracağı iddia edilen Muharrem İnce hakkında çok konuşulacak açıklamalarda bulundu. Ataklı, İnce’nin parti kurması halinde CHP’den fazla oy alacağını söyledi.
Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu yönetimindeki CHP’de kazan kaynamaya devam ediyor. Son olarak Muharrem İnce’nin yeni bir parti kuracağı iddiası siyasetin gündemine bomba gibi düştü.
Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan’a karşı aday olan ancak seçimlerde hezimete uğrayan Muharrem İnce, CHP Genel Başkanı Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu tarafından partiden dışlanınca yeni bir hareket içerisine girdi.
Parti kurup kurmama konusunda kamuoyunu yoklayan İnce, yeniden Cumhurbaşkanı adayı olmak için de çalışmalarını yürütüyor.
Yüzde 31’lik oyu yüzde 51’e çıkaracağını iddia eden İnce, CHP tarafından hain ve bölücü olarak dışlandı.
Bu gelişmeler yaşanırken CHP yandaşı Can Ataklı’dan Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu’nu çok kızdıracak bir çıkış geldi.
TELE 1’de çalışan Can Ataklı, ekranda yapamadığı analizleri YouTube kanalından yaptı.
Ataklı, "Net söylüyorum. Bugünkü ortamda, benim aldığım bilgiler ve deneyimlerim.. Bir parti kurulması halinde içinde Muharrem İnce’nin de olacağı bu parti, CHP’den daha fazla oy alacaktır. Oylar bölünüyor, yüzde 1 bile alamaz falan… Bunları bir kenara bırakın. Türkiye’de sistem böyle gitmez. Bir şeyler olacak. CHP’de konuştuğum etkili isimler, Muharrem İnce’nin içinde olacağı hareketin CHP’ye çok ciddi zarar vereceğini ve oy olarak da CHP’yi geçebileceğini söylüyor." dedi.
Muharrem İnce’yi Bülent Ecevit’e benzeten Ataklı, "Ecevit 1970’lerdeki hareketi başlattığında arkasında gençlik kolları vardı. Şu anda Muharrem İnce’nin arkasında özellikle gençlik kolları var. Gençlik kollarını arkasına alan bu partiden daha fazla oy alır." ifadelerini kullandı.
Can Ataklı, geçtiğimiz aylarda CHP’li İBB Başkanı Ekrem İmamoğlu’nu sert ifadelerle eleştirmişti. İBB’nin TELE1’i reklam vermemekle tehdit etmesinin ardından Can Ataklı kullandığı ifadeler nedeniyle özür dilemişti.
entry.summary: CHP yandaşı gazeteci Can Ataklı, yeni bir parti kuracağı iddia edilen Muharrem İnce hakkında çok konuşulacak açıklamalarda bulundu. Ataklı, İnce’nin parti kurması halinde CHP’den fazla oy alacağını söyledi. Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu yönetimindeki CHP’de kazan kaynamaya devam ediyor. Son olarak Muharrem İnce’nin yeni bir parti kuracağı iddiası siyasetin gündemine bomba gibi düştü. Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan’a karşı aday olan ancak seçimlerde hezimete uğrayan Muharrem İnce, CHP Genel Başkanı Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu tarafından partiden dışlanınca yeni bir hareket içerisine girdi. Parti kurup kurmama konusunda kamuoyunu yoklayan İnce, yeniden Cumhurbaşkanı adayı olmak için de çalışmalarını yürütüyor. Yüzde 31’lik oyu yüzde 51’e çıkaracağını iddia eden İnce, CHP tarafından hain ve bölücü olarak dışlandı. Bu gelişmeler yaşanırken CHP yandaşı Can Ataklı’dan Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu’nu çok kızdıracak bir çıkış geldi. TELE 1’de çalışan Can Ataklı, ekranda yapamadığı analizleri YouTube kanalından yaptı. Ataklı, "Net söylüyorum. Bugünkü ortamda, benim aldığım bilgiler ve deneyimlerim.. Bir parti kurulması halinde içinde Muharrem İnce’nin de olacağı bu parti, CHP’den daha fazla oy alacaktır. Oylar bölünüyor, yüzde 1 bile alamaz falan… Bunları bir kenara bırakın. Türkiye’de sistem böyle gitmez. Bir şeyler olacak. CHP’de konuştuğum etkili isimler, Muharrem İnce’nin içinde olacağı hareketin CHP’ye çok ciddi zarar vereceğini ve oy olarak da CHP’yi geçebileceğini söylüyor." dedi. Muharrem İnce’yi Bülent Ecevit’e benzeten Ataklı, "Ecevit 1970’lerdeki hareketi başlattığında arkasında gençlik kolları vardı. Şu anda Muharrem İnce’nin arkasında özellikle gençlik kolları var. Gençlik kollarını arkasına alan bu partiden daha fazla oy alır." ifadelerini kullandı. Can Ataklı, geçtiğimiz aylarda CHP’li İBB Başkanı Ekrem İmamoğlu’nu sert ifadelerle eleştirmişti. İBB’nin TELE1’i reklam vermemekle tehdit etmesinin ardından Can Ataklı kullandığı ifadeler nedeniyle özür dilemişti.
